message:
refactor(time): remove dead first_tick_done field from Interval

The first_tick_done field was set in poll_tick(), tick(), reset(),
reset_at(), and reset_after() but never read by any code path. Remove
the field and all 6 assignment sites to eliminate dead state tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
